hero.title: Smart & Efficient
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive HR management solution that helps businesses optimize processes, save time, and boost productivity.

features.title: All-in-One Platform
features.subtitle: From employee management to payroll, attendance, and reports - everything integrated in one system.

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.description: Centrally store and manage employee information, profiles, and contracts securely.

attendance.title: Smart Attendance
attendance.description: Support multiple attendance methods: GPS, QR Code, facial recognition, and device integration.

payroll.title: Automated Payroll
payroll.description: Automatically calculate salary, tax, insurance, and allowances with high accuracy.

contracts.title: Contract Management
contracts.description: Track labor contracts, expiration alerts, and manage renewals efficiently.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.description: Visual reports and smart dashboards for data-driven decision making.

security.title: High Security
security.description: Encrypted data, detailed permissions, and compliance with international security standards.

benefits.title: Why Choose UniHRM?
benefits.subtitle: Designed to meet the needs of modern businesses with flexible scalability.
benefits.item1: Save 80% of time on HR administrative tasks
benefits.item2: Reduce 95% of errors in salary and benefits calculations
benefits.item3: Access anywhere, anytime on multiple platforms
benefits.item5: Multi-language support: Vietnamese, English, Chinese, Lao, Khmer, Myanmar
benefits.item6: Continuously updated according to labor law regulations

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Hundreds of businesses have trusted and used UniHRM for effective HR management.
testimonials.item1: UniHRM has helped us save dozens of hours every month in processing payroll and attendance. The interface is intuitive and easy to use.
testimonials.item2: The reporting system is very powerful, helping leadership quickly and accurately grasp the HR situation.
testimonials.item3: Professional support team, quick responses. We are very satisfied with UniHRM's service.

pricing.title: Unified Enterprise Management Platform - Basic HRM Solution
pricing.subtitle: Choose a package that suits your business needs

showcase.title: Experience an Intuitive Interface
showcase.subtitle: Explore key features of UniHRM through a modern, user-friendly interface optimized for all devices.

captions.dashboard: Complete HR system overview with real-time statistics and analytics.
captions.profile: Comprehensive employee profiles with personal info, work details, and skills.
captions.work: Track work progress, assign tasks, and evaluate performance.
captions.uniai: Smart AI assistant supporting all HR operations.

aiAssistant.title: UniAI HR Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Leverage artificial intelligence in HR management to save time, boost efficiency, and make data-driven decisions.

f1.title: Job descriptions & interview questions
f1.description: Auto-generate detailed job descriptions, interview questions, and evaluation templates for each position.

f2.title: Resume screening & scoring
f2.description: Automatically scan CVs, classify by criteria, score relevance, and rank candidates.

f3.title: Interview scheduling & reminders
f3.description: Integrate calendars to auto-send invites, confirmations, and reminders for interviews.

f4.title: Benefits policy & KPI setup
f4.description: Suggest salary structures, allowances, analyze KPIs, and optimize compensation policies.

f5.title: HR analytics & reporting
f5.description: Aggregate data, provide visual dashboards on recruitment, retention, and HR trends.

f6.title: HR policy Q&A chatbot
f6.description: Smart chatbot answering questions about payroll, leave, insurance, and internal processes 24/7.

createRequest.desc: Describe your request naturally, AI creates the form for you
createRequest.fullDesc: Simply describe your request in natural language, AI will automatically create leave, overtime, or business trip requests for you.

evaluateCV.title: AI CV Evaluator & Matcher

evaluateCV.fullDesc: AI automatically evaluates candidate CVs based on job position criteria, scores and ranks suitability.

guide.title: User Guide
guide.heading: How to Use the System
guide.subtitle: Step-by-step guide for all modules in the HRM system

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.desc: Register an account and set up your company

register.title: Register an Account
register.content: Go to the registration page, enter your email and password to create a new account. After registering, check your email to verify your account.

company.title: Set Up Your Company
company.content: After logging in for the first time, follow the onboarding steps to create your company: enter company name, industry, address, and other basic information.

navigate.title: Navigate the System
navigate.content: Use the left sidebar to navigate between modules. The main menu includes: Dashboard, HR, Recruitment, Attendance, Payroll, and UniAI. The management section contains Company, Reports, and Settings.

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.desc: Add, edit, and manage employee information

add.title: Add New Employee
add.content: Go to Employees page → Click 'Add Employee' → Fill in required information (name, email, employee code, department, position) → Click Save.

profile.title: View & Edit Profile
profile.content: Click on an employee name to view their full profile. Here you can manage: personal info, contracts, salary, skills, certificates, work history, KPIs, and more.

import.title: Import Employees from Excel
import.content: Click the Import button → Download the template file → Fill in employee data → Upload the file. The system will validate and import the data automatically.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.desc: Check in/out, leave requests, and attendance reports

checkin.title: Check In / Check Out
checkin.content: Use the Check In widget on the Attendance page. Supported methods: QR Code scan, GPS location, Face ID recognition. The system records time, location, and device automatically.

rules.title: Attendance Rules
rules.content: Configure attendance rules in the Rules tab: set working hours, work days, rounding rules, allowed check-in methods (QR, GPS, Face ID), and late/early notifications.

leave.title: Leave Requests
leave.content: Go to the Leave tab → Click 'New Request' → Select leave type, date range, and reason → Submit. Managers can approve or reject requests from the same tab.

reports.title: Attendance Reports
reports.content: View attendance reports by department, employee, or time period. Export reports to Excel for further analysis. The system auto-calculates late minutes, overtime, and actual hours.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.desc: Salary components, templates, and payroll processing

components.title: Salary Components
components.content: Define salary components (base salary, allowances, deductions, bonuses) in the Components tab. Each component can have a fixed value or formula-based calculation.

templates.title: Salary Templates
templates.content: Create salary templates by combining components. Assign templates to employees or departments for consistent payroll structure.

batch.title: Process Payroll
batch.content: Go to Payroll Batches tab → Create new batch → Select salary period and employees → The system calculates salary based on attendance, components, and policies → Review and approve.

recruitment.title: Recruitment
recruitment.desc: Job postings, candidates, and interview management

posting.title: Create Job Posting
posting.content: Go to Job Postings tab → Click 'Create' → Fill in position, department, requirements, salary range → Publish the posting.

candidates.title: Manage Candidates
candidates.content: View all candidates in the Candidates tab. Track their progress through stages: Applied → Screening → Interview → Offer → Hired. Use the Kanban board for visual tracking.

interviews.title: Schedule Interviews
interviews.content: Go to Interviews tab → Click 'Schedule' → Select candidate, interviewer, date/time, and location → The system sends notifications to all parties.

create.title: Create Contract
create.content: Go to Contracts page → Click 'Add Contract' → Select employee, contract type, effective date, expiry date → Upload contract file (optional) → Save.

manage.title: Manage Contracts
manage.content: View all contracts with status tracking (Active, Expiring, Expired). The system alerts you when contracts are about to expire so you can renew them in time.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.desc: Manage insurance policies and employee coverage

policy.title: Insurance Policies
policy.content: Go to Insurance page → View existing policies or add new ones. Each policy includes: type, provider, coverage period, and premium details.

employee.title: Employee Coverage
employee.content: Assign employees to insurance policies. Track coverage status, enrollment dates, and expiry alerts for each employee.

company.title: Company
company.desc: Company info, departments, and member management

info.title: Company Information
info.content: Update company details in the Company tab: name, address, phone, email, tax code, industry, and logo.

departments.title: Department Management
departments.content: Create and organize departments with a hierarchical structure. Set department heads, codes, and descriptions. View the organization chart for a visual overview.

members.title: Member Management
members.content: Invite team members by email. Assign roles (Admin, HR Manager, Employee) to control access permissions across the system.

overview.title: Report Overview
overview.content: View key metrics on the Reports page: employee overview, contract status, leave statistics, recruitment pipeline, and turnover rates. Use filters to narrow down by department or time period.

export.title: Export Reports
export.content: Export any report to Excel or PDF format for sharing with stakeholders. Schedule automatic report generation for regular updates.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.content: Use the UniAI chat to ask HR-related questions. The AI understands your company context and can help with policies, procedures, and data analysis.

tools.title: AI Tools
tools.content: UniAI provides specialized tools: Document Generator (create HR documents), Document Extractor (extract data from files), CV Evaluator (auto-score candidate CVs), and HR Request Creator.

branding.title: Branding
branding.content: Customize your system appearance: upload company logo, change system name, and set primary color theme to match your brand identity.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.content: Create custom roles and configure permissions for each module (view, create, edit, delete). Assign roles to team members to control their access level.

taskManagement.title: Task Management
taskManagement.subtitle: Track and manage tasks in your company
taskManagement.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.

form.meetingUrlPlaceholder: Paste Google Meet, Zoom, or Teams link...

importDialog.title: Import Tasks from Excel
importDialog.downloadTemplateDesc: Download Excel template to fill task data
